_comment: Focus profiles — a soft lens over the tool registry, not a gate. Selecting a focus boosts in-focus tools (by category and/or server id) in search + cast ranking; out-of-focus tools stay reachable. Select via env CH1TTY_FOCUS=<name> or the per-call `focus` param on ch1tty/search and ch1tty/cast. Server ids and categories reference servers.json — profiles may name disabled/future servers (they simply won't match until present).

finance.description: Billing, payments, ledger, and financial ecosystem tools

governance.description: ChittyOS ecosystem governance, identity, evidence, persistent state, sessions, and ledger

design.description: Browser rendering, automation, and desktop/visual work

code.description: Software development — source control, issue tracking, deployment, library documentation, database, code quality, and technical documentation tools

communication.description: Cross-channel messaging, notes, team communication, and follow-up task creation

ops.description: Deployment, infrastructure monitoring, and DevOps tooling — Cloudflare Workers, database ops, source control, filesystem, and orchestration
